system.descriptor: Tracking covers the ability to follow trails and tracks, whether of beasts, men, or vehicles, across varied terrain.
system.uses:
Uses: Following tracks and trails, identifying what left a trail, estimating how old tracks are, concealing one's own trail.
Special Use: Shadow: Make an opposed Tracking vs. Awareness test to follow a target through populated areas without being noticed.
Special Use: Cover Tracks: Make a Tracking test to disguise or eliminate signs of passage. Others attempting to follow the concealed trail suffer a penalty equal to your Degrees of Success on the roll.

description.value:
Tracking covers the ability to follow trails and tracks, whether of beasts, men, or vehicles, across varied terrain.

In Deathwatch, Tracking is a standalone skill. In Dark Heresy 2e, this functionality is covered by the Survival skill.
